learn_meta_description: Funda izincwadi ze-{targetLang} ngokuhumusha okulinganiselayo ngolimi lwakho. Lalela umsindo wezilimi zomdabu ngenkathi ufunda. Yakha ulwazi lwegama le-{targetLang} ngokuphinda okuhlukanisiwe. Uhlelo lokusebenza olwahlukanisiwe lwemali ye-iOS & Android.
hero_title: Thuthukisa {targetLang} yakho ngenkathi uthokozela izincwadi ozithandayo
features_subtitle: Amathuluzi asebenza kahle ku-interface elula neqondile
feature_parallel_desc: Funda imibhalo ye-{targetLang} nokuhumusha eceleni. Akudingeki isichazamazwi.
feature_audio_desc: Lalela ukulandisa ngomsindo we-{targetLang} ngesikhathi ulandela umbhalo.
feature_srs_desc: Gcina futhi uphinde amagama e-{targetLang} ngokuphinda okuhlukanisiwe.
feature_level_desc: Okuqukethwe okufanele noma yiliphi izinga — kusukela koqalayo ku-{targetLang} kuya kophakeme.
feature_languages_desc: Funda {targetLang} kunoma yiluphi ulimi lwendabuko kwezingu-90+.
feature_content_desc: Funda {targetLang} ngemibhalo ethakazelisayo — khula njengomuntu ngesikhathi ufunda.
steps_subtitle: Yakha inqubo esebenza kahle ngokuthuthukisa amakhono amaningi ngesikhathi esisodwa
step1_desc: Ukufunda okuhambisanayo kukuvumela ukuthi udlule kalula emibhalweni ye-{targetLang}. Bona okoqobo nokuhumusha eceleni — amakhono okufunda, uhlelo lolimi namagama athuthuka ngokwemvelo.
step2_desc: Landela umsindo wolimi lwendabuko we-{targetLang} ukuze uqeqeshe indlebe yakho futhi uthuthukise ukuphimisa. Yakha ukuqonda okuzethembayo kwenkulumo ye-{targetLang} ngesivinini semvelo.
step3_desc: Gcina amagama okufundeni, noma ulayishe amaqoqo alungiselelwe wamagama abaluleke kakhulu e-{targetLang}. Khumbula amagama phakade ngokuphinda okuhlukanisiwe okufakazelwe ngokwesayensi.
faq1_answer: Nge-Lingo7, imizuzu engu-30 kuphela ngosuku yokufunda okuhambisanayo nge-{targetLang} iholela enqubekeni ebonakalayo ngamasonto. Ukuzijwayeza kwansuku zonke okujwayelekile kusebenza kangcono kunezifundo ezinde nezingajwayelekile.
faq2_answer: Indlela yokufunda okuhambisanayo ye-Lingo7 ilungile kakhulu kubantu abaqalayo ku-{targetLang}. Ubona ukuhumusha eceleni kombhalo wokoqobo, ngakho ungaqala ukufunda {targetLang} kusukela ngosuku lokuqala ngaphandle kokuzizwa ulahlekile.
faq3_question: Yini eyenza i-Lingo7 yehluke kwezinye izinhlelo zokufunda {targetLang}?
faq3_answer: I-Lingo7 igxile ekufundeni okubanzi — indlela eyemvelo kakhulu nesebenza kahle yokufunda {targetLang}. Esikhundleni semisebenzi ehlukanisiwe, ufunda imibhalo yangempela nokuhumusha okuhambisanayo, umunca uhlelo lolimi namagama e-{targetLang} esimweni.
faq4_answer: Yebo! I-Lingo7 isekela izilimi ezingu-90+ zendabuko. Ungafunda {targetLang} nokuhumusha ngolimi olukhetha.
other_languages_desc: I-Lingo7 isekela izilimi ezingu-90+. Khetha olunye ulimi lokufunda:
features_slider_description: Wonke umusho we-{targetLang} uboniswa eceleni kohumusho lwe-{uiLang}. Ufunda ngokwemvelo, umunca amagama e-{targetLang} kanye nohlelo lolimi kumongo — akudingeki ukuma ukufuna amagama.
features_slider_benefit2: Ukumuncwa kwemvelo — funda uhlelo lolimi lwe-{targetLang} namagama kumabhuku ngempela
features_slider_benefit3: Izincwadi zangempela — hhayi ukusebenzisa izincwadi zokufundisa, kodwa izindaba ozithokozelayo ngempela
audio_title: Lalela futhi ufunde i-{targetLang} ngesikhathi esifanayo
audio_subtitle: Vula umsindo futhi ulandele ngamehlo akho — enye yezindlela ezisheshayo zokuphucula ukulalela kwakho kwe-{targetLang} nokubiza amagama.
audio_benefit_native: Ukubiza kwabokuzalwa — izwe lonke igama likhulunywa ngokwemvelo
audio_benefit_sync: Ukuvumelana igama negama — umbhalo ugqanyiswa njengoba ulalele
audio_benefit_ear: Qeqesha indlebe yakho — yakha ukuqonda okuzethembayo ngesivinini semvelo
practice_subtitle: Ukuphinda okunesikhathi kungenye yamasu okufunda afundwe ngokucophelela kakhulu ekhulwini eledlule — ngokuphindaphindiwe kukhonjisiwe ukuthi kungcono kunokubambelela nokuphinde ufunde. I-Lingo7 ilandelela lonke igama olithinta uma ufunda futhi iligoqa ukuze ulibuyekeze ngaphambi kokuba ulikhohlwe. Imisebenzi eyi-14 ehlukile — kusukela ekuboneni okusheshayo kuya ekukhumbuleni okusebenzayo, ukuthayipha nokubiza — iqinisa inkumbulo ngawo wonke amakhona.
practice_desc_choose: Bona igama bese ukhetha inguqulo elungile kokune okukhethwayo
practice_desc_listen: Lalela igama bese ukhetha inguqulo elungile — iqeqesha indlebe yakho
practice_desc_spell: Yakha igama uhlamvu ngohlamvu kusukela ezimpawini ezixutshanisiwe
practice_desc_is_correct: Bona igama nenguqulo — ngokushesha unqume ukuthi kulungile yini
practice_desc_pronounce: Biza igama bese uthola impendulo yokunemba ngokushesha
practice_desc_recall: Zama ukukhumbula inguqulo enkumbulweni ngaphambi kokuyembula
how_subtitle: Yakha indlela ephumelelayo ngokuthuthukisa amakhono amaningi kanyekanye
how_step1_desc: Ukufunda okuhambisanayo kwimodi yokufunda okusheshayo kukuvumela ukudlula kalula ngisho nakumbhalo onzima.
how_step2_desc: Vula umsindo futhi ulandele ngamehlo akho — lena enye yezindlela ezisheshayo zokuphucula ukulalela kwakho nokubiza "ngendlebe".
how_step3_desc: Londoloza amagama owathandayo ekufundeni nasemsindweni, noma ulayishe iqoqo elisekulungele lamagama avame kakhulu nabalulekile ukwakha isichazamazwi sakho ngendlela ephumelelayo kakhulu.
how_step3_result1: uhlelo lokuphinda okunesikhathi lukusiza ukhumbule amagama unomphela
how_bonus1_desc: Izinto zifanelekile kunoma iliphi izinga — kusukela kwabaqalayo kuya kwabathuthukile.
how_bonus2_desc: Funda ulimi futhi ukhule njengomuntu ngesikhathi esifanayo.
how_summary_text: I-Lingo7 ihlanganisa amakhono abalulekile olimi kube yinqubo eyodwa — ngakho ukuthuthuka kwakho kuyashesha futhi kuyabonakala.
faq2_subtitle: Imigomo emi-5 esetshenziswa yiwo wonke umkhulumi wezilimi eziningi — yakhelwe ngaphakathi kwe-Lingo7.
faq2_item1_principle: Umgomo: Ukufunda ngobubanzi — ukudla amavolumu amakhulu ombhalo ongawuqondayo kakhulu — yenye yezindlela ezisekelwe kakhulu ucwaningo eziya ekukhulumeni kahle (Krashen's input hypothesis). Ikhethelo liwukususa ukuhlikihleka ukuze ukwazi ukufunda okuningi ngaphandle kokuma.
faq2_item1_how: Indlela i-Lingo7 esiza ngayo: Inguqulo ehambisanayo ihlala ngakusoko kwemvelo — akukho ukubheka isichazamazwi, akukho ukuphula umsinga. Imodi ye-Turbo igqamisa amagama ngesigqi uma ulahlekelwa yindawo yakho, ukuze ukwazi ukudla amakhasi esikhundleni sokuwachaza.
faq2_item2_principle: Umgomo: Ukuphinda okunesikhathi kungenye yamasu okufunda afundwe ngokucophelela kakhulu ekhulwini eledlule. Umqondo: buyekeza lonke igama ngaphambi kokuba ulikhohlwe — lelo yisikhathi lapho ukuphindaphinda okukodwa kuqinisa kakhulu inkumbulo.
faq2_item2_how: Indlela i-Lingo7 esiza ngayo: Uhlelo lokuphinda okunesikhathi lwe-Lingo7 lulandelela lonke igama olilondolozayo futhi liligoqe ngesikhawu esihle kakhulu. Awuhleleli lutho — i-algorithm isingatha isikhathi, futhi imisebenzi eyi-14 ehlukile igcina inkumbulo ibukhali emakhoneni wonke.
faq2_item3_principle: Umgomo: Abakhulumi bezilimi eziningi abawafundi wonke amagama ngokulandelana — bagxila kulawo abaletha umvuzo. Amagama asetshenziswa kakhulu abusa ulimi lwansuku zonke: amakhulu ambalwa amagama avame kakhulu enele ukuqala ukuqonda izincwadi zangempela, izingxoxo, namaphephabhuku.
faq2_item3_how: Indlela i-Lingo7 esiza ngayo: Amaqoqo amabili okuqala ahlelwe ngokuya ngemvama akhiwe ngedatha ye-corpus — amagama ayi-100 adumile kakhulu ukuze uqale, bese kuba angu-250 amanye ukuze ube nokuqhubeka kwangempela. Atholakala ezilimini eziyi-70+. Funda okuncane okunikeza okuningi, esikhundleni sokufuna isichazamazwi ongeke usiqede.
faq2_item4_principle: Umgomo: Izincwadi ezinesicefe zibulala ugqozi. Abakhulumi bezilimi eziningi bakhetha imibhalo abayithokozelayo ngempela — izincwadi abazithandayo, amaphephabhuku, amascript — ngoba intshisekelo iyona eqhubeka nokuzilolonga kwansuku zonke izinyanga neminyaka, hhayi amandla engqondo.
faq2_item4_how: Indlela i-Lingo7 esiza ngayo: Umtapo wolwazi omkhulu, okhulayo ngezinhlobo eziningi — amanoveli akudala, amaphephabhuku anamuhla, izifinyezo zezihloko. Ukhetha lokho ohlala ukunakekela ngempela, hhayi lokho incwadi yokufundisa ekunikeza kona. Intshisekelo yenza umsebenzi onzima wokukugcina uqhubeka.
faq2_item5_principle: Umgomo: Ukuthuthuka okusheshayo kakhulu kwenzeka uma ukufunda, ukulalela, amagama, nokubiza kuqinisa kokunye. Igama olifundile, wezwa futhi walibiza likhunjulwa ngendlela eyokuzilolonga okuzikhethele okungeke kufinyelele — imiphumela jikelele ikhula ngokushesha kunesamba semisebenzi ngayinye.
faq2_item5_how: Indlela i-Lingo7 esiza ngayo: Isikhathi sokufunda esisodwa sihlanganisa zonke ezine: ufunda ikhasi ngokuhumusha okuhambisanayo, ulalela ukulandisa kanye nokugqamisa igama negama, uthinte amagama amasha ukuze uwalondoloze, futhi uzilolonge ukubiza kulawo owafundayo. Amakhono amane aqeqeshwa ngokufanayo, phakathi kwemizuzu engu-7–15 ngosuku.
testimonials_subtitle: Izindaba zangempela kusuka kwabafunda izilimi emhlabeni wonke
testimonial_1: Uvo lokuthi "awufundi" kodwa uvele ufunde bese uyaqonda ngokushesha — aluthengwa. Kwenziwe kahle ngempela.
testimonial_2: Ukufunda okuhambisanayo ngempela kuyindlela elula kakhulu yokufunda ulimi ngaphandle kobuhlungu.
testimonial_3: Ukufunda lapha kuzwakala ngokwemvelo: umongo uyisihluthulelo. Uma ubona umusho ophelele, unamathela kalula futhi ngaphandle kokuzibekezela.
testimonial_4: Ekugcineni, ukufunda okungakudinisi: vele ufunde futhi umunce.
testimonial_5: Kimi akumayelana "nokufunda amagama" kodwa nokugcina ulimi lwami lubukhali. Kulula ukufunda njalo futhi uhlale kumongo — ithuluzi elihle lokugcina izinga lakho.
testimonial_6: Indlela ethokozisa kakhulu yokwakha amagama. Ngaqala ukuhumusha okungaphansi igama negama engqondweni yami futhi ngaqonda okuningi ngokusho.
testimonial_7: Ngiqala ezinganeni, futhi kubalulekile ukungagcwali emithethweni. Lapha ngivele ngifunde ezingcezwaneni ezincane futhi angikhathazeki — ukuba nenguqulo eduze kusiza ngempela.
testimonial_8: Kuhle ukuthi uhlelo lokusebenza alugcwele kakhulu ngezinto zangaphandle. Uvele ufunde bese ukancane kancane uqala ukubona amagama nezindlela. Inqubo ezolile, ekhiqizayo.
testimonial_9: Ngiyakuthanda ukuthi awudingi ukuncika ogqozini. Ngisho noma ukhathele, nokufunda izigatshana ezimbili sekuyiziluleko.
testimonial_10: Kungani ngangingatholanga lokhu ngaphambilini? Ekugcineni senginesigqi esijwayelekile: vula — imizuzu engu-15 — vala, futhi ngifunde ngempela.
testimonial_12: Ezingeni eliphakathi lokhu kukhulu: uqinisa uhlelo lolimi namagama ngezibonelo zangempela. Uqala ukubamba izinkulumo ezimile ngokushesha.
testimonial_13: Ngithokozile ngomuzwa wokuthi "ngifunda ngempela". Hhayi imisebenzi yokuzilolonga, kodwa ulimi oluphilayo, futhi ubuchopho bami buqala ukuhlanganisa indoloka ngokwabo.
testimonial_14: Ukufunda ngolimi lwangaphandle kwakuyisijeziso, manje kuyathokozisa ngempela. Umbhalo ohambisanayo ukusindisa ekuboshweni.
testimonial_15: Ngathanda ukuthi ukugxila kusekuqondeni umbhalo. Ukuba nenguqulo eduze kusiza ekungalahlekelweni umsinga futhi ukufunda kumongo. Kulula kakhulu kunokufunda ngenhloko.
testimonial_16: Umbhalo + inguqulo eceleni = ifomethi ephelele yokuzijwayeza kwangempela.
testimonial_17: Ngiyathanda ukuthi ungafunda ngezikhathi ezincane. Ngisho nemizuzu engu-20-30 izwakala ikhiqiza ngoba iyimibhalo yangempela nolimi lwangempela.
testimonial_18: Ngangicabanga ukuthi ngizoyeka futhi emuva kwezinsuku ezimbili... kodwa lokhu kuyakudonsa ngempela. Ufunde futhi uthi: "Oh, ngikutholile!" — bese ufuna okuncane okunye.
testimonial_19: Ezingeni eliphezulu, ivolumu nekhwalithi yokuxhumana nolimi yikona okubalulekile. Lapha kwenzeka ngokwemvelo: ufunda okuningi ngaphandle kokuhlikihleka.
testimonial_20: Kwenziwe kahle: vula umbhalo, funda, uhlole ngokushesha bese uqhubeka. Yingakho ungakhathali futhi ungayeki emuva kwezinsuku ezintathu.
testimonial_21: Kulula kakhulu ukungena — okuncane nsuku zonke, ngaphandle kokucindezeleka.
testimonial_22: Okungaphansi okungadingekile, ukubaluleka okuphakeme kakhulu — ngiyazithanda izinhlelo zokusebenza ezifana nalezi.
testimonial_23: Ngiyekile ngempela ukugxuma phakathi kwezichazamazwi futhi ngilahlekelwe yincazelo. Ukufunda sekuyilonke, futhi ukuthuthuka kuyabonakala kakhulu ngenxa yalokho.
testimonial_24: Ngithanda ngempela ifomethi yokuthi "funda futhi ufunde". Akukho ukulungisa, akukho ukufuna izinto — vele uvule futhi uzilolonge. Kuhle kakhulu kubantu abamatasa.
testimonial_25: Umzuzu wami engiwuthandayo kakhulu yilapho uzithola ngokushesha ufunda ngokushesha futhi ukhubazeka kancane kulo lonke igama. Kukhuphula kakhulu ugqozi!
testimonial_26: Ngalefomethi ngiyekile ukubambeka esichazamazwini njalo ngomzuzu.
testimonial_27: Ngikuthola kunzima ukuqala ngoba konke kubukeka kudidisa. Kodwa lapha ngibona incazelo ngokushesha — futhi ngithola ukuzethemba ukuqhubeka.
testimonial_28: Ngifunda ngokujabula — futhi ngokushesha kwaba "isifundo" sami.
testimonial_29: Lolu uhlelo lokuqala lokusebenza lapho ngingazizwa ngiyisiwula. Akukho ukwethuka kumagama angajwayelekile — inguqulo iseduze, futhi uqhubeka nje.
testimonial_30: Sengivele ngiyazazi izisekelo, kodwa ngangingenakho ukuzilolonga okujwayelekile. Ifomethi ilungele kahle usuku lwami: ngifunda futhi ngiphakamisa ukuqonda kwami ngaphandle kokulungisa okuningi.
download_section_subtitle: Landa i-Lingo7 bese uqala ukufunda ulimi namuhla
library_subtitle: Kusuka ezindabeni zakudala zezinganyana kuya ezishoteleni zezincwadi ezibekiwe kanye neziqephu ezikhuthazayo — kuhlale kukhona okufundwa ngesi{targetLang}
library_upload_subtitle: Layisha incwadi yakho bese uyifunda nge-parallel translation, umsindo namathuluzi okufunda amagama
library_upload_desc: Funda noma yiliphi incwadi ye-EPUB noma ye-FB2 nge-parallel translation
library_total: Izincwadi ezintsha zengezwa njalo ngesonto. Ungaphinda ulayishe incwadi yakho ye-EPUB noma ye-FB2 bese uyifunda ngesi{targetLang} nge-parallel translation.
